question_intent: total revenue from sales of products in the 'Confections' category for the year 1997

plan.question_intent: total revenue from sales of products in the 'Confections' category for the year 1997
plan.detail_query: SELECT p.productname, c.categoryname, od.unitprice, od.quantity, od.discount, (od.unitprice * od.quantity * (1 - od.discount)) AS revenue FROM products AS p JOIN order_details AS od ON p.productid = od.productid JOIN categories AS c ON p.categoryid = c.categoryid WHERE c.categoryname = 'Confections' AND strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997'

build_logs.notes: calculates the total revenue from sales of products in the 'Confections' category for the year 1997

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT p.productid, od.unitprice, od.quantity, od.discount
FROM products AS p
JOIN "order details" AS od ON p.productid = od.productid
JOIN orders AS o ON od.orderid = o.orderid
WHERE (p.categoryid = (SELECT categoryid FROM categories WHERE categoryname = 'Confections')) AND (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT SUM(leaf_1.unitprice * leaf_1.quantity * (1 - leaf_1.discount)) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT p.productid, od.unitprice, od.quantity, od.discount
FROM products AS p
JOIN "order details" AS od ON p.productid = od.productid
JOIN orders AS o ON od.orderid = o.orderid
WHERE (p.categoryid = (SELECT categoryid FROM categories WHERE categoryname = 'Confections')) AND (strftime('%Y', o.orderdate) = '1997')) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(sales_value)
FROM (SELECT c.categoryname, p.productname, od.unitprice, od.quantity, (od.unitprice * od.quantity) AS sales_value
FROM categories AS c
JOIN products AS p ON c.categoryid = p.categoryid
JOIN "order details" AS od ON p.productid = od.productid
WHERE (c.categoryname = 'Confections') AND (STRFTIME('%Y', (SELECT o.orderdate FROM orders AS o WHERE o.orderid = od.orderid)) = '1997')) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(leaf_1.freight) AS total_freight_cost
FROM (SELECT e.employeeid, o.freight FROM employees e JOIN employeeterritories et ON e.employeeid = et.employeeid JOIN territories t ON et.territoryid = t.territoryid JOIN region r ON t.regionid = r.regionid JOIN orders o ON e.employeeid = o.employeeid WHERE (r.regionid = 1) AND (strftime('%Y', o.shippeddate) = '1997')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total revenue generated in 1997 from all products in the 'Confections' category?
